references.role: structural Licorn kitchen context for all segments
references.prompt: Preserve cabinet layout, lighting direction, and overall Licorn kitchen identity without forcing a wide camera angle.

references.role: terrazzo island identity for batter prep and final hero plating
references.prompt: Light terrazzo countertop, consistent island proportions for prep bowls and final hero stack.
Overhead terrazzo and bowl placement for meringue, sift, and fold beats.
Black flush induction with dark nonstick skillet; lowest heat steam cook for three tall mounds.
Stand mixer bowl shape only; meringue whip action.

references.role: hand whisk for yolk batter and gentle folds

references.prompt: Fine mesh sieve for flour snowfall beat.
Offset spatula slide and roll flip only.
Character identity for hands and outro only.

references.role: top-down hands for whisk and fold
references.prompt: Top-down hand pose for prep actions.

references.role: canonical celebration motion for outro segment
references.prompt: Video motion reference for standardized outro only.

references.role: stiff glossy meringue peak topology for hook and fold start
references.prompt: Three tall Japanese soufflé pancakes are not in frame. Generate one vertical-reference still of stiff glossy meringue in a stainless mixer bowl: peak stands straight with tip folding slightly, smooth not grainy, bright white, Licorn kitchen overhead light on pale terrazzo. No character. No pancakes.

references.role: homogenous airy batter after final fold
references.prompt: Folded soufflé pancake batter in a glass bowl: homogenous pale yellow, visible air suspension, no white streaks, thick but pourable. Overhead Licorn island. No character.

references.role: three uncooked stacked mounds before steaming
references.prompt: Dark nonstick skillet on black induction: exactly three tall pale batter mounds 7-8 cm base, 4-6 cm high each, spaced, not spread flat. Thin oil sheen. No lid yet. No character.

references.role: set domes under steam before flip
references.prompt: Three tall soufflé pancake domes in same pan: matte set tops, slight puff, moist look, still pale on top, steam wisps, glass lid lifted to side. Same scale as raw mounds reference. No golden underside visible yet.

references.role: post-flip golden set pancakes in pan
references.prompt: Three soufflé pancakes in pan after flip: golden-brown undersides now facing up, edges set, gentle height preserved, light steam. Same pan and spacing. Not collapsed.

references.role: finished hero stack for plating segment and outro dish identity
references.prompt: Three tall Japanese soufflé pancakes stacked on a white plate with one whipped-cream quenelle, halved strawberries and blueberries, light confectioners sugar dust, intact and motionless on the terrazzo island. Generate one vertical-reference still: cottony golden edges, 7-8 cm bases, 12-15 cm total stack height, no fork, no bite, no hand touching food. Licorn kitchen @KitchenIslandDefault lighting. No character in frame.
